case_title: NAYLOR, ROBIN D VS YUSTER, JOSH

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YUSTER, JOSH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,325.84 FILED BY NAYLOR, ROBIN D AS TO DEFENDANT YUSTER, JOSH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAYLOR, ROBIN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUSTER, JOSH $2,380.02 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,460.02, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES ENFORCEMENT OF THE RENT BOARD AWARD OF $740.84; REDUCTION OF $500 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAYLOR, ROBIN D AS TO DEFENDANT YUSTER, JOSH
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $141.31 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO APPELLANT YUSTER, JOSH
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ROBIN NAYLOR.
APPLICATION FOR FEE WAIVER GRANTED.
DEFT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28404, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NAYLOR, ROBIN D RECOVER FROM APPELLANT YUSTER, JOSH $4,113.34 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,113.34, JUDGMENT ALSO IN FAVOR OF CROSS-COMPLAINANT/DEFENDANT FOR $476.22; SEE JUDGMENT FOR FULL TERMS. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL #28404; EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (SEE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL #28404)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST RECEIPT NO. 25256 BY APPELLANT YUSTER, JOSH
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY APPELLANT YUSTER, JOSH
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YUSTER, JOSH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NAYLOR, ROBIN D STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $4,113.34 RE 25256 FOR TRANSACTION (), PAYABLE TO ROBIN NAYLOR, DOC #1902828464, WARRANT #38004006, DATED MAY-05-2010
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT YUSTER, JOSH
